name: Solana Developers
fullText:
The new Anchor v1.0.0 Release Candidate is out.

What's new:

1) In the future, you should be able to use avm self-update

2) Anchor now uses Solana SDK version >3.0

3) The TS client moved home @  coral-xyz/anchor -> @ anchor-lang/anchor

4) IDL is no longer handled directly by

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: 2025 NBA Champion Oklahoma City Thunder will not visit the White House due to “timing issue”

fullText: Order is subject to adjustment at any time. Also worth noting that this meme is missing the space lasers. https://t.co/qAkdlMZsIF
